title: astragalus quisqualis
intro: Astragalus quisqualis, also known as the Chrysocoma or Quisqualis, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Astragalus quisqualis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus quisqualis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
